prompts.text: Explain quantum entanglement like I'm a curious 10-year-old.
Write a haiku about debugging code at 3am.
What's the best approach to learn a new programming language quickly?
If you could have dinner with any three historical figures, who would you choose and why?
Solve this: A farmer has 17 sheep. All but 9 die. How many are left?
Write a short story about an AI that becomes self-aware but decides to keep it a secret.
Explain the difference between machine learning, deep learning, and AI in simple terms.
Write a Python function to find all prime numbers up to n using the Sieve of Eratosthenes.
What are the pros and cons of remote work? Give a balanced analysis.
Explain blockchain to someone who has never heard of it.
You are a medieval knight who just discovered a smartphone. Describe your experience.
What's 15% of 85? Show your work.
Write a compelling product description for a smart water bottle that tracks hydration.
If all roses are flowers and some flowers fade quickly, can we conclude that some roses fade quickly?
Explain the concept of recursion using a real-world analogy.
Write a regex pattern to validate email addresses and explain each part.
What would happen if humans could photosynthesize?
Compare and contrast REST and GraphQL APIs.
Write a limerick about artificial intelligence.
A bat and ball cost $1.10. The bat costs $1 more than the ball. How much does the ball cost?

imagePrompts.text: A serene Japanese garden with cherry blossoms falling into a koi pond at sunset
A cyberpunk cityscape at night with neon signs and flying cars
A cozy cabin in the mountains during a snowstorm, warm light glowing from windows
A steampunk robot bartender serving drinks in a Victorian-era saloon
An astronaut floating in space with Earth reflected in their helmet visor
A magical forest with bioluminescent mushrooms and fireflies at twilight
A cute corgi wearing a tiny crown sitting on a velvet throne
A dramatic ocean wave about to crash, with a lighthouse in the background
An ancient library with towering bookshelves and floating magical books
A futuristic sports car parked on a cliff overlooking a neon city
A dragon perched on a castle tower under a full moon
A street food market in Tokyo with colorful lanterns and steam rising from stalls
A cat astronaut exploring an alien planet with purple vegetation
A majestic waterfall in a tropical paradise with rainbow mist
A retro 80s arcade with glowing game cabinets and neon lights
A samurai warrior standing in a field of tall grass at golden hour
An underwater city with glass domes and bioluminescent sea creatures
A cozy coffee shop interior with plants, books, and rain on the windows
A phoenix rising from flames against a starry night sky
A vintage Porsche 911 driving through an autumn forest road

dailyChallenges.text: In exactly 100 words, describe the future of AI in 2050.
Write a function in any language that determines if a number is a palindrome. Make it as elegant as possible.
Explain the Monty Hall problem and prove why switching is the better choice.

imageDailyChallenges.text: Create the most photorealistic image of a single water droplet on a leaf
Generate a movie poster for an AI-directed film called 'The Last Algorithm'
Create an impossible architecture scene - a building that defies physics
